<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets all available builds for a project's version."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{project}/versions/{version}/builds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets all available builds for a project's version.

  as={"h2"}
